protocol: ETH v2.33 Round 23 phase 2 distinct state machines
reason_for_phase2: Phase 1 found a robust downside compression effect but insufficient month/quarter dispersion. Phase 2 changes the event/exit state machine rather than adding date filters or correcting July 2026 trades.
round22_holdout_policy: EXCLUDED FROM DESIGN, SELECTION AND EVALUATION

architectures.idea: Trade a wide directional range expansion through a prior 12h structural level without requiring a compression setup.
Compression expansion entry with a fixed 50% realization at 0.8R and the remainder targeting 2.4R; no signal filter added.
Compression expansion entry with a causal time-decay exit when no 0.35R follow-through appears within four bars.
Break a prior 12h level when current ATR rises above its own causal 24h baseline and the candle closes near the directional extreme.

neighbour_policy: One-at-a-time nearest perturbations declared in code and included in the artifact; no date/time or July-specific parameters.
